description: allapp.net appears to host infrastructure for AccurateScribe.ai, an AI transcription service that converts audio and video into text. On the public web, the only verified developer-facing surface on this domain is the MCP endpoint used for transcription-related agent access.
summary: allapp.net exposes one verified integration surface: an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://notify.allapp.net/mcp for AccurateScribe.ai transcription.
